title: Creamy Italian Yacon Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy dessert fritter featuring yacon, creamy goodness, and a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and Italian extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the creamy milk, eggs, and grated yacon.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Using a spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
Sprinkle the crumble topping over the fritters while still warm.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy!
